plugins.name: example-mcp-node-skill
plugins.description: Demonstrates a skill backed by a Node.js MCP server with an external dependency.

plugins.name: example-mcp-python-skill
plugins.description: Demonstrates a skill backed by a Python MCP server with an external dependency.

plugins.name: example-skill
plugins.description: Placeholder skill to validate the marketplace pipeline.

plugins.name: markdown-doc-cleaner
plugins.description: Turns rough notes into a clean, well-structured Markdown document with headings and bullet points.

plugins.name: plugin-diff
plugins.description: Plain-language summary of what changed between two versions of a Claude Code plugin, covering behavior, security posture, and documentation.

plugins.name: plugin-docs-lint
plugins.description: Fast check that a plugin's README.md meets Mirantis marketplace documentation standards.

plugins.name: plugin-scaffold
plugins.description: Generates a complete, correctly structured Claude Code plugin directory from a plain-language description.

plugins.name: plugin-security-check
plugins.description: Deep security and compliance inspection of a Claude Code plugin folder: format, credentials, dangerous behaviors, blast radius, and documentation quality.

plugins.name: submit-plugin
plugins.description: Full PR submission workflow for the Mirantis Claude Skills Marketplace: runs security check, clones repo, creates branch, and files a pull request with the full review report.

plugins.name: validate-marketplace
plugins.description: Curator tool: walks all plugins in a marketplace repository and reports format compliance issues, missing files, and documentation gaps.
